title: // your operating system
subtitle: [everything you sell, stock, and schedule — built once, used everywhere]
firstRun.headline: Stand up your catalog
firstRun.sub: Your price book, your stock, your trades — set up once, ready for every estimate.
commitPartial: Saved {saved}. Some items need a fix — build again.
commitTypesWarning: Catalog's live — task types didn't save. Re-run setup to add them.
offline.title: Offline
offline.detail: [ build holds until you're back — nothing's lost ]
offline.held: You're offline — your catalog is saved, build when you're back
gate.no_company.title: NO COMPANY YET
gate.no_company.body: Your account isn't tied to a company. Set one up first — your catalog lives inside it.
gate.baseline_not_seeded.title: ALMOST READY
gate.baseline_not_seeded.body: We're still standing up your company's basics. Give it a minute, then reload — setup opens once that's done.
gate.catalog_surface_absent.title: CATALOG OFFLINE
gate.catalog_surface_absent.body: The catalog isn't loading right now. Try again in a moment — your setup will be here when it's back.
gate.subscription_locked.title: PLAN NEEDS ATTENTION
gate.subscription_locked.body: Sort your subscription out and setup picks right back up. Nothing you've built is lost.
gate.session_locked.title: ALREADY IN SETUP
gate.session_locked.body: Your catalog's open in another window. Finish or close it, then reload here — nothing's lost.
agent.none: Couldn't pull anything from that — try describing what you sell
agent.unavailable: Guided setup is unavailable — add manually
agent.error: Couldn't generate — switched to guided setup
rail.title: // module rail
section.sell.caption: what you charge for
section.stock.caption: what you keep on hand
section.types.caption: the work you do
section.review.caption: lock it in
section.sell.empty: Nothing to sell yet. Import a price list or add a line.
section.stock.empty: Nothing tracked yet. Import a count or add an item.
section.types.empty: No types yet. Pick your trade or add one.
section.review.empty: Nothing staged. Accept a card to load it here.
inventoryOff.title: Track inventory
inventoryOff.tail: without tracking inventory. Turn tracking on to keep counts — or keep them as products. Nothing's dropped either way.
inventoryOff.trackError: Couldn't turn on tracking — try again
inventoryOff.kept: Kept as products — quantities shown on each
hint.needsPrice: [set a price before this goes live]
source.import.label: [from your file]
source.suggested.label: [surfaced for you]
source.template.label: [from your trade]
source.manual.label: [added by you]
totals.proposed.label: [surfaced]
totals.added.label: [going live]
data.name: NAME
dedupe.title: // matched a row you already have
dedupe.hint: [merge keeps one row and folds in what changed]
field.name: name
build.caption: [adds {count} to your catalog — nothing goes live until you build]
build.empty: [accept at least one card to build]
build.blocker.name: // {count} rows need a name
build.doneCaption: [{count} added — find them under your catalog]
notify.title: Catalog built
driver.title: // SETUP
driver.lead: Tell me what you sell. Drop in a price list, pick your trade, or just type a line — it lands on the canvas as you go.
driver.start.title: How do you want to start?
driver.start.hint: [everything lands on one canvas — pick what's easiest]
driver.start.upload.desc: A CSV price list or spreadsheet
driver.start.describe.desc: Tell setup what you sell, in plain words
driver.start.template.desc: A starter built for your trade
driver.start.manual.desc: Type a line at a time
upload.title: // UPLOAD
upload.lead: Hand over a price list — it lands on the canvas, and nothing saves until you build it.
upload.drop: Drop a price list here, or click to browse
upload.hint: [ CSV or Excel with a name and a price column ]
upload.staged: Staged {count} — review them on the right
upload.merged: {count} already in your catalog — merge or skip on each
upload.errorsTitle: // some rows need a fix first
upload.errorsHint: [ fix them in your file, then upload again ]
upload.tooLarge: That file's too big — keep it under {max}MB, or split it.
upload.cantRead: Couldn't read that one — save it as a CSV with a name and a price, or add items by hand
driver.trade.title: Pick your trade
driver.trade.hint: [a starting point — trim what doesn't fit]
qb.title: // QUICKBOOKS
qb.lead: Pull your price book straight from QuickBooks. It lands on the canvas, and nothing saves until you build it.
qb.ready: You're on QuickBooks. Pull your items in?
qb.connectLead: Connect QuickBooks to pull your price book in.
qb.pulled: Pulled {count} — review them on the right
qb.matched: {count} already in your catalog — merge or skip on each
qb.reconnectLead: QuickBooks needs reconnecting before you can pull.
qb.errorLead: Couldn't reach QuickBooks. Try again in a moment.
driver.convo.lead: What do you sell, and how do you charge for it?
driver.convo.user.sample: Vehicle wraps. Full wraps by the vehicle, materials by the foot.
driver.convo.reply: On it. Here's your catalog — skim it, fix anything off, then build it.
editor.title: EDIT
editor.unit.label: unit
editor.taskType.label: type
